name: energyAudit
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data. annualCost = round(monthlyBill*12,2); costPerSqFt = round(annual/sqft,2); efficiencyLoss = min(50, age*2)%; estimatedAnnualSavings = round(bill*loss/100)*12; roiScore = min(100, loss*2); grade A<1.5 / B<2.5 / C<3.5 / else D; savingsOpportunities is the issues[] array (never empty — a clean system gets a 'no red flags' entry so the <ul> never renders bare). Fail-CLOSED numerics via Number()+Number.isFinite (NOT parseFloat) → poisoned bill/sqft/age never produce NaN. Result card renders annualCost/costPerSqFt/estimatedAnnualSavings/systemEfficiency/expectedLifespan/savingsOpportunities/roiScore/recommendation EXACTLY (the prior potentialAnnualSavings/efficiencyLoss/issues/grade were not what the card read — fixed 2026-06-28; retained as aliases).
